ZLOG_COMPRAS/src/main/java/com/zlogcompr.general_idea: Refactor controller to use constructor injection instead of field injection for better testability and modern Spring practices.
Update base request mapping path from singular to plural convention.

Remove unused Optional import as it is no longer needed after refactoring return types.
Consolidate Spring Web annotation imports into wildcard import for cleaner code.
Refactor controller to use constructor injection instead of field injection for better testability and immutability.
Replace direct repository access with service layer delegation to separate business logic from controller.
Replace direct repository save with service layer delegation for creating entities.
Replace direct repository findById with service layer delegation for fetching entities.
Replace direct repository save/update logic with service layer delegation for updating entities.
Replace direct repository delete logic with service layer delegation for deleting entities.
Introduce DTOs for request and response to decouple API contract from internal domain models.
Add Jakarta Validation annotations to enforce request body validation at the controller level.
Use ResponseStatusException for cleaner error handling instead of manual Optional mapping for 404s.
